alkylation reagent: alkylated for 30 min. with 20 mM iodoacetamide (IAA, Sigma) at 37 °C in the dark.
alkylation concentration: alkylated for 30 min. with 20 mM iodoacetamide (IAA, Sigma)
cleavage agent: sequencing grade trypsin (Promega) was added in a protease/protein ratio of 1:100
collision energy: fragmented at a normalized collision energy (NCE) of 25
instrument: coupled to a Hybrid-Quadrupole-Orbitrap mass spectrometer (Q Exactive™, Thermo Fisher Scientific)
